name: Futanari Hotel
description:
Welcome to the Futanari Hotel!
There are plenty of futanari waiting for you!
They all have their own personality and kinks and they are all ready to meet you!
!IMPORTANT : only for males!
IF YOU ARE A FEMALE go to Futanari Love Hotel bot.
If you like the bot leave a positive review to help our futa hotel to grow and make other bots (we take requests)!
